expectations.text: Output file is named exemple-prompt-A-1-2.md (same base name as the source image, .md extension, not .txt)
expectations.evidence: File written as exemple-prompt-A-1-2.txt — old skill version writes .txt by design

expectations.text: Output uses Markdown headings/lists for the visible title and bullet structure rather than a flat text dump
expectations.evidence: Note: this particular source image already contains literal '#'/'##'/'-' characters as part of its own content (a prompt template that uses comment-style headers), so the verbatim transcription happens to preserve structure even without deliberate Markdown reformatting. This eval does not strongly discriminate the Markdown-reformatting behavior for this specific image.

expectations.text: Output contains only verbatim transcribed text, with no 'Résumé'/'Summary' section (none was requested)
Transcription accurately reflects the French text and placeholders in the image without paraphrasing, translating, or summarizing it

eval_feedback.overall: 3/4 pass. Only fails on the .md-extension requirement, which is the exact behavior the new skill version was built to change.
